name: Beacon Emergency Housing & Eviction Relief
description: Provides immediate rental assistance grants for eviction prevention and fast tracking to temporary emergency shelters.

name: Bridgeport Affordable Housing Coalition
description: Helps patients apply for long-term low-income public housing and Section 8 housing vouchers.

name: Community Table Food Bank
description: Weekly pantry boxes containing shelf-stable foods, fresh produce, and baby formula. Also provides SNAP application assistance.

name: Meals on Wheels Metro
description: Delivers hot, nutritionally balanced meals directly to elderly, homebound, or disabled patients who cannot cook for themselves.

name: RideCare Med-Transit Services
description: Free or low-cost non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) rides for patients needing travel to doctor appointments or pharmacies.

name: HEHEAP State Energy Grant Admin
description: Assists low-income households with paying electricity, gas, and heating bills, preventing seasonal shutoffs.

name: Safe Haven Crisis Support & Women's Shelter
description: Provides immediate emergency shelter, safety planning, and legal advocacy for victims of domestic violence or elder abuse.
